name: principal-vscode
description: Bridges VS Code/Cursor debugger state to MCP-compatible AI editors for AI-assisted debugging.

princiPal.port.description: Port for the MCP server. All editor instances share this single port.

princiPal.autoStart.description: Automatically start the MCP server when a debug session begins.

princiPal.capture.maxLocalDepth.description: Max nesting depth when expanding local variables via DAP (lower reduces load on the debug adapter and MCP payload).

princiPal.capture.maxVariablesPerLevel.description: Max variables requested per DAP variablesReference (caps huge scopes).

princiPal.capture.maxTotalLocalNodes.description: Hard cap on total local variable nodes collected across the tree (prevents runaway expansion).

princiPal.capture.maxValueLength.description: Max characters per variable value string (very large strings are truncated).

princiPal.capture.maxStackFrames.description: Max stack frames to send to the MCP server.

princiPal.capture.maxBreakpoints.description: Max breakpoints listed per push (prioritizes the current file when over the cap).

princiPal.maxJsonPayloadChars.description: If the JSON body exceeds this size, locals are replaced with a short notice before POST (last-resort guard).
